channel.title: Maine Judicial Branch Court Alerts & Closings
channel.description: Definition-list (dt/dd) of court closures and alerts with no per-item links; monitored by full-page fingerprint.

item.title: Monitoring started: Maine Judicial Branch Court Alerts & Closings
item.description: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
